---
title: "Available data"
description: "The data available in HICD"
---

## Questionnaire data
The following information was collected through questionnaire between Nov 18 2020 and Feb 7 2021: 

* Anthropometrics
* Dental health
* Diabetes-specific problems and motivation
* Diabetic status
* Dyspnoea
* Fertility
* Sexual dysfunction
* Sleeping problems
* Symptoms and diseases
* Taste and smell
* Well-being

## Register data
The following register data are available in the HICD:

The following register data are available in the HICD.

* Danish National Patinet Register
* Danish National Health Service Registry
* Danish National Prescription Register Statistic
* Clinical Laboratory Information System (LABKA), The Central Denmark Region
* Register of Laboratory Results for Research
* Cause of Death Register

Most of the registers data are available more than 20 years before inclusion in the cohort. 

## List of variables
This is where I would put lists of the specific variables from each wave in the cohort and the register variables available within the project

<style>
.custom-details {
  margin-bottom: 1rem;
  border: 1px solid #d9d9d9;
  border-radius: 8px;
  padding: 0.5rem 1rem;
  background-color: #f8f9fa;
}

.custom-details summary {
  font-weight: 600;
  cursor: pointer;
  list-style: none;
}

.custom-details summary::-webkit-details-marker {
  display: none;
}

.custom-details summary::after {
  content: "⌄";
  float: right;
  transition: transform 0.2s ease;
}

.custom-details[open] summary::after {
  transform: rotate(180deg);
}

details.custom-details table {
  font-size: 0.85em;
  line-height: 1.2;
details.custom-details table {
font-size: 0.85em;
line-height: 1.2;
}

details.custom-details th,
details.custom-details td {
padding: 4px 8px;
}
</style>

<details class="custom-details">
<summary>2020 Codebook</summary>



| Questionnaire              | Variablename      | Label                                                                                                                              | List of Value                                                                                                                                                               | Question                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| -------------------------- | ----------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| Generic/Social             | height            | Height                                                                                                                             | cm                                                                                                                                                                          | How tall are you (without shoes)?                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| Generic/Social             | weight            | Weight                                                                                                                             | kg                                                                                                                                                                          | How much do you weigh in whole kg (without clothes)?                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| Generic/Social             | smoke             | Smoking status                                                                                                                     | 1=Daily, 2=Weekly, 3= Less than weekly, 4=Stopped, 5= Never                                                                                                                 | Do you smoke? (does not apply to e-cigarettes)                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| Generic/Social             | alcohol           | How often do you have drink containing alcohol?                                                                                    | 1=Never, 2=Monthly or less, 3=2-4 times a month, 4=2-3 times a week, 5=4 or more times a week                                                                               | How often do you drink beverages containing alcohol?                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| Generic/Social             | alcohol_con       | How many standard drinks containing alcohol do you have on af typical day when drinking?                                           | 1=1 or 2, 2=3 of 4, 3=5 or 6, 4=7 to 9, 5=10 or more                                                                                                                        | How many units do you usually drink when you drink alcohol?                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| Generic/Social             | bingedrink        | How often do you have six or more drinks on one occasion?                                                                          | 1=Never, 2=Less than monthly, 3=Monthly, 4=Weekly, 5=Daily or almost daily                                                                                                  | How often do you drink 5 units or more on the same occasion?                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| Generic/Social             | activitylevel     | Leisure time activity level                                                                                                        | 1=Regular hard physical training, 2=Regular physical activity, 3=Some physical activity, 4=Sedentary                                                                        | If you look at the past year, what would best describe your physical activity during leisure time?                                                                                                                                                                    |
| Generic/Social             | family            | Contact with family                                                                                                                | 1=Daily, 2=1 or 2 times a week, 3=1 or 2 times a month, 4=Less than 1 time  a month, 5=Never                                                                                | How often are you in contact with friends, acquaintances and family members who do not live with you? By contact we mean being together, talking on the phone, writing to each other, etc. Family members who do not live with you                                    |
| Generic/Social             | friends           | Contact with friends                                                                                                               | 1=Daily, 2=1 or 2 times a week, 3=1 or 2 times a month, 4=Less than 1 time  a month, 5=Never                                                                                | How often are you in contact with friends, acquaintances and family members who do not live with you? By contact we mean being together, talking on the phone, writing to each other, etc. Friends                                                                    |
| Generic/Social             | colleague         | Contact collegues in leisure time                                                                                                  | 1=Daily, 2=1 or 2 times a week, 3=1 or 2 times a month, 4=Less than 1 time  a month, 5=Never                                                                                | How often are you in contact with friends, acquaintances and family members who do not live with you? By contact we mean being together, talking on the phone, writing to each other, etc. Colleagues or fellow students in your leisure time                         |
| Generic/Social             | neighbour         | Contact with neighbours                                                                                                            | 1=Daily, 2=1 or 2 times a week, 3=1 or 2 times a month, 4=Less than 1 time  a month, 5=Never                                                                                | How often are you in contact with friends, acquaintances and family members who do not live with you? By contact we mean being together, talking on the phone, writing to each other, etc. Neighbours or residents in your local area                                 |
| Generic/Social             | socialweb         | Contact with persons social media                                                                                                  | 1=Daily, 2=1 or 2 times a week, 3=1 or 2 times a month, 4=Less than 1 time  a month, 5=Never                                                                                | How often are you in contact with friends, acquaintances and family members who do not live with you? By contact we mean being together, talking on the phone, writing to each other, etc. People you mostly know from the internet (email, social media and similar) |
| Generic/Social             | socialalone       | Does it happen you are alone_even though you want to be with others?                                                               | 1=Often, 2=Once in a while, 3=Rarely, 4=No                                                                                                                                  | Does it ever happen that you are alone, even though you would most like to be with others?                                                                                                                                                                            |
| Generic/Social             | socialtalk        | Do you have someone to talk to if you have problems or need support?                                                               | 1=Always, 2=Mostly, 3=Some times, 4=Never or almost never                                                                                                                   | Do you have someone to talk to if you have problems or need support?                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| WHO5                       | who5_1            | Have felt cheerful and in good spirits                                                                                             | 5=All the time, 4=Most of the time, 3=More than half of the time, 2=Less than half of the time, 1=Some of the time, 0=At no time                                            | Hvordan har du følt dig i de seneste to uger. I de sidste 2 uger har jeg været glad og i godt humør                                                                                                                                                                   |
| WHO5                       | who5_2            | Have felt calm and relaxed                                                                                                         | 5=All the time, 4=Most of the time, 3=More than half of the time, 2=Less than half of the time, 1=Some of the time, 0=At no time                                            | Hvordan har du følt dig i de seneste to uger. I de sidste 2 uger har jeg følt mig rolig og afslappet                                                                                                                                                                  |
| WHO5                       | who5_3            | Have felt active and vigorous                                                                                                      | 5=All the time, 4=Most of the time, 3=More than half of the time, 2=Less than half of the time, 1=Some of the time, 0=At no time                                            | How have you felt over the past two weeks. In the past two weeks I have felt active and energetic                                                                                                                                                                     |
| WHO5                       | who5_4            | Woke up feeling fresh and rested                                                                                                   | 5=All the time, 4=Most of the time, 3=More than half of the time, 2=Less than half of the time, 1=Some of the time, 0=At no time                                            | How have you felt over the past two weeks. In the past two weeks I have woken up feeling fresh and well rested                                                                                                                                                        |
| WHO5                       | who5_5            | Daily life has been filled with things of interest                                                                                 | 5=All the time, 4=Most of the time, 3=More than half of the time, 2=Less than half of the time, 1=Some of the time, 0=At no time                                            | How have you felt over the past two weeks. In the past two weeks my daily life has been filled with things that interest me                                                                                                                                           |
| SF12                       | i1                | In general, would you say your health is                                                                                           | 1=Exellent, 2=Very good, 3=Good, 4=Fair, 5=Poor                                                                                                                             | How would you describe your health overall?                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| SF12                       | i2a               | Limitations in Moderate activities                                                                                                 | 1=Limited a lot, 2=Limited a little, 3=Not limited at all                                                                                                                   | Daily activities. Are you, because of your health, limited in lighter activities, such as moving a table, vacuuming, or cycling?                                                                                                                                      |
| SF12                       | i2b               | Limitaions in climbing several flights og stairs                                                                                   | 1=Limited a lot, 2=Limited a little, 3=Not limited at all                                                                                                                   | Daily activities. Are you, because of your health, limited in climbing several flights of stairs?                                                                                                                                                                     |
| SF12                       | i3a               | Accomplished less than you would like_physical health                                                                              | 1=Yes, 2=No                                                                                                                                                                 | During the past 4 weeks, how much of the time have you had the following problems with your work or other daily activities due to your physical health? I have accomplished less than I would have liked                                                              |
| SF12                       | i3b               | Were limited in the kind of work or other activities_physical health                                                               | 1=Yes, 2=No                                                                                                                                                                 | During the past 4 weeks, how much of the time have you had the following problems with your work or other daily activities due to your physical health? I have performed my work or other activities less carefully than usual                                        |
| SF12                       | i4a               | Accomplished less than you would like_emotional problems                                                                           | 1=Yes, 2=No                                                                                                                                                                 | During the past 4 weeks, how much of the time have you had the following problems with your work or other daily activities due to emotional problems? I have accomplished less than I would have liked                                                                |
| SF12                       | i4b               | Did work or activities less carefully than usual_emotional problems                                                                | 1=Yes, 2=No                                                                                                                                                                 | During the past 4 weeks, how much of the time have you had the following problems with your work or other daily activities due to emotional problems? I have performed my work or other activities less carefully than usual                                          |
| SF12                       | i5                | During the past 4 weeks, how much did pain interfere with your normal work                                                         | 1=Not at all, 2=A little bit, 3=Moderately, 4=Quite a bit, 5=A little of the time, 6=None of the time                                                                       | During the past 4 weeks, to what extent has physical pain made your daily work difficult? Both work outside the home and housework                                                                                                                                    |
| SF12                       | i6a               | Have you felt calm & peaceful?                                                                                                     | 1=All of the time, 2=Most of the time, 3=A good bit of the time, 4=Some of the time, 5=A little of the time, 6=None of the time                                             | During the past 4 weeks, how much of the time have you felt calm and relaxed?                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| SF12                       | i6b               | Did you have a lot of energy?                                                                                                      | 1=All of the time, 2=Most of the time, 3=A good bit of the time, 4=Some of the time, 5=A little of the time, 6=None of the time                                             | During the past 4 weeks, how much of the time have you felt full of energy?                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| SF12                       | i6c               | Have you felt down-hearted and blue?                                                                                               | 1=All of the time, 2=Most of the time, 3=A good bit of the time, 4=Some of the time, 5=A little of the time, 6=None of the time                                             | During the past 4 weeks, how much of the time have you felt downhearted and low in mood?                                                                                                                                                                              |
| SF12                       | i7                | Physical health or emotional problems interfered with your social activities                                                       | 1=All of the time, 2=Most of the time, 3=Some of the time, 4=A little of the time, 5=None of the time                                                                       | During the past 4 weeks, how much of the time have your physical health or emotional problems made it difficult for you to see other people? For example, visiting friends or relatives                                                                               |
| Symptoms                   | symp_1            | During the last two weeks have you experienced dyspnoea?                                                                           | 1= at rest, 2= doing normal daily activities(bath, dressing, etc.), 3= normal walking( hoovering etc.), 4=hard physical work (stairs, cutting the lane, running etc), 5= no | During the last two weeks have you experienced dyspnoea?                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| Symptoms                   | symp_2            | During the last two weeks have often have dyspnoea limited your activities                                                         | 1= all the time, 2= daily, 3= several times per week, 4= seldom/ never                                                                                                      | During the last two weeks have often have dyspnoea limited your activities                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| Symptoms                   | symp_3            | During the last two weeks have often have you had to sit up on a chair or use more than two pillows in the bed because of dyspnoea | 1= every night, 2=several times per week, 3= less than once a week, 4= no                                                                                                   | During the last two weeks have often have you had to sit up on a chair or use more than two pillows in the bed because of dyspnoea                                                                                                                                    |
| Symptoms                   | symp_4            | Have you had swelled legs during the last two weeks                                                                                | 1= daily, 2=several times per week, 3= less than once a week, 4= no                                                                                                         | Have you had swelled legs during the last two weeks                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| Symptoms                   | symp_5            | During the last two weeks have you experienced pain/oppression in the chest                                                        | 1= at rest, 2= doing normal daily activities(bath, dressing, etc.), 3= normal walking( hoovering etc.,4=hard physical work (stairs, cutting the lane, running etc), 5= no   | During the last two weeks have you experienced pain/oppression in the chest                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| Symptoms                   | symp_6            | During the last two weeks have pain/oppression in the chest limited your activities                                                | 1= daily, 2=several times per week, 3= less than once a week, 4= no                                                                                                         | During the last two weeks have pain/oppression in the chest limited your activities                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| Symptoms                   |                   | How hampered have you been because of these symptoms during the last two weeks                                                     |                                                                                                                                                                             | How hampered have you been because of these symptoms during the last two weeks                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| Symptoms                   | mave_1            | Heartburn                                                                                                                          | 1= not at all, 2= a little, 3= moderate, 4= much, 4= extreme                                                                                                                | Heartburn                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| Symptoms                   | mave_2            | Constipation                                                                                                                       | 1= not at all, 2= a little, 3= moderate, 4= much, 4= extreme                                                                                                                | Constipation                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| Symptoms                   | mave_3            | Nausea or vomit                                                                                                                    | 1= not at all, 2= a little, 3= moderate, 4= much, 4= extreme                                                                                                                | Nausea or vomit                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| Symptoms                   | mave_4            | Diarré                                                                                                                             | 1= not at all, 2= a little, 3= moderate, 4= much, 4= extreme                                                                                                                | Diarré                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| Symptoms                   | mave_5            | Stomach ache                                                                                                                       | 1= not at all, 2= a little, 3= moderate, 4= much, 4= extreme                                                                                                                | Stomach ache                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| Symptoms                   | mave_gp           | Would you like to talk to a doctor about your stomach troubles?                                                                    | 1=yes, 0= no, 9=dont know                                                                                                                                                   | Would you like to talk to a doctor about your stomach troubles? only this quest if answer >1 in at least one of the above quests                                                                                                                                      |
| Smell and Taste            | smell             | Rating of smell since the last 14 days                                                                                             | Continous arbitrary 1:100, 1= No smell, 100=perfect smell                                                                                                                   | Please rate how good your sense of smell has been on average over the past 14 days                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| Smell and Taste            | smell_fanta       | Fantomic smell since the last 14 days                                                                                              | 1=No, 2= yes I experience odors to be distorted, 3= yes I experience odors that are not there, 4= yes both distortion and odors that are not there                          | In the last 14 days, have you experienced that known odors are distorted or that you detected odors that were not present?                                                                                                                                            |
| Smell and Taste            | smell_age         | Age when smell changed                                                                                                             | 999= do not know, 1000= never experienced problems                                                                                                                          | If your sense of smell is impaired, distorted, or you experience odors that are not present: How old were you when the sense of smell changed?                                                                                                                        |
| Smell and Taste            | smell_rate        | Speed of smell change                                                                                                              | 1= suddenly, 2=gradually, 9= do not know                                                                                                                                    | Has your altered sense of smell occurred suddenly or gradually?                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| Smell and Taste            | taste             | Rating of taste since the last 14 days                                                                                             | Continous arbitrary 1:100, 1= No smell, 100=perfect smell                                                                                                                   | Please rate how good your sense of taste has been on average over the past 14 days                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| Smell and Taste            | taste_fanta       | Fantomic taste since the last 14 days                                                                                              | 1=No, 2= yes I experience basic tastes to be distorted, 3= yes I experience basic tastes that are not there, 4= yes both distortion and basic tastes that are not there     | In the last 14 days, have you experienced that basic tastes are distorted or that you register tastes that are not present?                                                                                                                                           |
| Smell and Taste            | taste_age         | Age when taste changed                                                                                                             | years, 999= do not know, 1000= never experienced problems                                                                                                                   | If your sense of taste is impaired, distorted, or you experience tastes that are not present: How old were you when your sense of taste changed?                                                                                                                      |
| Smell and Taste            | taste_rate        | Speed of taste change                                                                                                              | 1= suddenly, 2=gradually, 9= do not know                                                                                                                                    | Has your altered sense of taste occurred suddenly or gradually?                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| Smell and Taste            | smelltaste_impact | Rating of negative consequences of impaired smell/taste on quality of life                                                         | Continous arbitrary 1:100, 1= No impact, 100= total impact                                                                                                                  | Does changes in the sense of smell and / or taste have a negative consequence for your quality of life?                                                                                                                                                               |
| Teeth                      | tandvurd          | General dental health                                                                                                              | 1=Excellent, 2=Very good, 3=Good, 4=Fair, 5=Poor, 9=Do not know                                                                                                             | How would you overall assess the health of your teeth and gums?                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| Teeth                      | torhed            | Sense of dry mouth                                                                                                                 | 1=Not feeling dry, 2=Some dryness, 3=Very dry mouth, 4=Severe dryness in mouth                                                                                              | Do you have a daily sensation of dryness in your mouth?                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| Teeth                      | taender           | Number of teeth                                                                                                                    | 1= No teeth, 2=1-9 teeth, 3=10-19 teeth, 4=20-27 teeth, 5= All teeth                                                                                                        | Almost all adults have had teeth extracted. How many of your own teeth do you have left?                                                                                                                                                                              |
| Teeth                      | para              | Paradentose                                                                                                                        | 1=Ja, 2=Nej                                                                                                                                                                 | Do you think you have periodontal disease?                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| Teeth                      | rens              | Paradentose treatment                                                                                                              | 1=Ja, 2=Nej                                                                                                                                                                 | Have you received treatment for periodontal disease, for example deep cleaning and root planing, also known as “deep cleaning”?                                                                                                                                       |
| Pregnancy                  | pregnancy         | Previous pregnancy                                                                                                                 | 1= I have been pregnant, 2= I am pregnant at the moment, 3= no                                                                                                              | Have you ever been pregnant?                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| Pregnancy                  | birth_number      | Number of births                                                                                                                   | continious                                                                                                                                                                  | How many of the following have you experienced? Births                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| Pregnancy                  | abort_spon        | Number of miscarriages                                                                                                             | continious                                                                                                                                                                  | How many of the following have you experienced? Miscarriages                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| Pregnancy                  | abort_prov        | number of induced abortions                                                                                                        | continious                                                                                                                                                                  | How many of the following have you experienced? Induced abortion                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| Pregnancy                  | any_contraception | Any Contraceptives                                                                                                                 |                                                                                                                                                                             | Do you use safe contraseptives?                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| Pregnancy                  | midler_01         | Intrauterine system (hormone)                                                                                                      |                                                                                                                                                                             |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| Pregnancy                  | midler_02         | Intrauterine device (copper coil)                                                                                                  |                                                                                                                                                                             |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| Pregnancy                  | midler_03         | Combined oral contraceptive pill                                                                                                   |                                                                                                                                                                             |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| Pregnancy                  | midler_04         | Vaginal ring                                                                                                                       |                                                                                                                                                                             |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| Pregnancy                  | midler_05         | Contraceptive patch                                                                                                                |                                                                                                                                                                             |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| Pregnancy                  | midler_06         | Contraceptive injection                                                                                                            |                                                                                                                                                                             |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| Pregnancy                  | midler_07         | Progestogen-only pill                                                                                                              |                                                                                                                                                                             |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| Pregnancy                  | midler_08         | Contraceptive implant                                                                                                              |                                                                                                                                                                             |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| Pregnancy                  | midler_09         | Sterilisation                                                                                                                      |                                                                                                                                                                             |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| Pregnancy                  | midler_10         | Condoms                                                                                                                            |                                                                                                                                                                             |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| Pregnancy                  | midler_11         | Other                                                                                                                              |                                                                                                                                                                             |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| Pregnancy                  | preg_wish         | Pregnancy wish                                                                                                                     |                                                                                                                                                                             | Do you wish to become pregnant?                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| Pregnancy                  | pregwish_time     | Pregnancy wish time                                                                                                                | months                                                                                                                                                                      | How long have you tried to become pregnant?                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| Pregnancy                  | preg_gp1          | Pregnancy counsil allready                                                                                                         |                                                                                                                                                                             | Have you sought counsil from your doctor on how to achieve optimal conditions for a healthy pregnancy?                                                                                                                                                                |
| Pregnancy                  | preg_gp2          | Wish for pregnancy counsil                                                                                                         |                                                                                                                                                                             | Would you like to talk to your doctor or another healthcare professional, on how to achieve optimal conditions for a healthy pregnancy                                                                                                                                |
| Insomnia Severity Index    | isi_1             | Difficulty falling asleep                                                                                                          | 0=None, 1= Mild, 2=Moderate, 3=Severe, 4= Very                                                                                                                              |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| Insomnia Severity Index    | isi_2             | Difficulty staying asleep                                                                                                          | 0=None, 1= Mild, 2=Moderate, 3=Severe, 4= Very                                                                                                                              |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| Insomnia Severity Index    | isi_3             | Problem waking up too early                                                                                                        | 0=None, 1= Mild, 2=Moderate, 3=Severe, 4= Very                                                                                                                              |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| Insomnia Severity Index    | isi_4             | Satisfied/dissatified with slleping pattern                                                                                        | 0=Very satisfacting, 1=satisfacting, 2=neutral, 3=dissatisfacting, 4=Very dissatisfacting                                                                                   |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| Insomnia Severity Index    | isi_5             | Sleep problem interfere with daily function                                                                                        | 0=Not at all interfering, 1= A little, 2=Somewhat, 3=Much, 4= Very much interferring                                                                                        |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| Insomnia Severity Index    | isi_6             | Noticeable to others                                                                                                               | 0=Not at all noticeable, 1= Barely, 2=Somewhat, 3=Much, 4= Very much noticeable                                                                                             |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| Insomnia Severity Index    | isi_7             | Worried/distressed about current sleeping problem                                                                                  | 0=Not at all, 1= A little, 2=Somewhat, 3=Much, 4= Very much                                                                                                                 |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| Insomnia Severity Index    | isi_score         | Insomia severity index sumscore                                                                                                    |                                                                                                                                                                             |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| Insomnia Severity Index    | isi_level         | Insomia severity index level                                                                                                       | 0= No clinically significant insomia (≤7), 1=subtreshold insomia (8-14), 2=clinical insomia (moderate severity) (15-21), 3=clinical insomia (severe) (22-28)                |
| Blood presure and diabetes | bp_self           | Do you konow your blood pressure?                                                                                                  | 1=yes, 0= No                                                                                                                                                                | Do you konow your blood pressure?                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| Blood presure and diabetes | bp_sys_self       | Systolic blood pressure                                                                                                            | MmHg                                                                                                                                                                        | What is your systolic blood pressure?                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| Blood presure and diabetes | bp_dia_self       | Diastolic blood pressure                                                                                                           | MmHg                                                                                                                                                                        | What is your diastolic blood pressure?                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| Blood presure and diabetes | diabetes_parent   | Have or had your parents diabetes?                                                                                                 | 1=yes, 0= no, 9=dont know                                                                                                                                                   | Do or did your parents have diabetes?                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| Blood presure and diabetes | diabetes_sibling  | Have or had your siblings diabetes?                                                                                                | 1=yes, 0= no, 9=dont know                                                                                                                                                   | Do or did your siblings have diabetes?                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| Blood presure and diabetes | Diagnose          | Do you have diabetes?                                                                                                              | 1=yes, 0= no, 9=dont know                                                                                                                                                   | Do you have diabetes?                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| Diabetes-specific          | diabetes_type     | Diabetes type                                                                                                                      | 1=Type 1, 2=Type 2, 3= don't know                                                                                                                                           | Diabetes type                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| Diabetes-specific          | diabetes_age      | How old were you when a doctor told you that you had diabetes?                                                                     | years                                                                                                                                                                       | How old were you when a doctor told you that you had diabetes?                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| Diabetes-specific          | neuropathy_1      | Had a doctor ever told you that you have diabetic pedestrain disease (eg. neurophaty)?                                             | 1=yes, 0= No                                                                                                                                                                | Have a doctor ever told you that you have diabetic foot disease (eg. neurophaty)?                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| Diabetes-specific          | neuropathy_2      | Have you had a pediatric examination by a podiatrist during the last 24 months?                                                    | 1=yes, 0= No                                                                                                                                                                | Have you had a foot examination by a podiatrist during the last 24 months?                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| Diabetes-specific          | retinopathy_1     | Had a doctor ever told you that you have diabetic eye disease (eg. retinophaty)?                                                   | 1=yes, 0= No                                                                                                                                                                | Have a doctor ever told you that you have diabetic eye disease (eg. retinophaty)?                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| Diabetes-specific          | retinopathy_2     | Have you had an eye examination by a ophthalogist during the last 24 months?                                                       | 1=yes, 0= No                                                                                                                                                                | Have you had an eye examination by a ophthalogist during the last 24 months?                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| PAM                        | pam01             | I am the person who is responsible for taking care of my health                                                                    | 1= Disagree strongly, 1= Disagree, 3= Agree, 4=Agree strongly, 0= N/A                                                                                                       |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| PAM                        | pam02             | Taking an active role in my own health care is the most important thing that affects my health                                     | 1= Disagree strongly, 1= Disagree, 3= Agree, 4=Agree strongly, 0= N/A                                                                                                       |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| PAM                        | pam03             | I am confident I can help prevent or reduce problems associated with my health                                                     | 1= Disagree strongly, 1= Disagree, 3= Agree, 4=Agree strongly, 0= N/A                                                                                                       |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| PAM                        | pam04             | I know what each of my prescribed medications do                                                                                   | 1= Disagree strongly, 1= Disagree, 3= Agree, 4=Agree strongly, 0= N/A                                                                                                       |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| PAM                        | pam05             | I am confident that I can tell whether I need to go to the doctor or whether I can take care of a health problem myself            | 1= Disagree strongly, 1= Disagree, 3= Agree, 4=Agree strongly, 0= N/A                                                                                                       |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| PAM                        | pam06             | I am confident that I can tell a doctor or nurse concerns I have even when he or she does not ask                                  | 1= Disagree strongly, 1= Disagree, 3= Agree, 4=Agree strongly, 0= N/A                                                                                                       |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| PAM                        | pam07             | I am confident that I can carry out medical treatments I may need to do at home                                                    | 1= Disagree strongly, 1= Disagree, 3= Agree, 4=Agree strongly, 0= N/A                                                                                                       |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| PAM                        | pam08             | I understand my health problems and what causes them                                                                               | 1= Disagree strongly, 1= Disagree, 3= Agree, 4=Agree strongly, 0= N/A                                                                                                       |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| PAM                        | pam09             | I know what treatments are available for my health problems                                                                        | 1= Disagree strongly, 1= Disagree, 3= Agree, 4=Agree strongly, 0= N/A                                                                                                       |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| PAM                        | pam10             | I have been able to maintain lifestyle changes, like healthy eating or exercising                                                  | 1= Disagree strongly, 1= Disagree, 3= Agree, 4=Agree strongly, 0= N/A                                                                                                       |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| PAM                        | pam11             | I know how to prevent problems with my health                                                                                      | 1= Disagree strongly, 1= Disagree, 3= Agree, 4=Agree strongly, 0= N/A                                                                                                       |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| PAM                        | pam12             | I am confident I can work out solutions when new problems arise with my health                                                     | 1= Disagree strongly, 1= Disagree, 3= Agree, 4=Agree strongly, 0= N/A                                                                                                       |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| PAM                        | pam13             | I am confident that I can maintain lifestyle changes, like healthy eating and exercising, even during times of stress              | 1= Disagree strongly, 1= Disagree, 3= Agree, 4=Agree strongly, 0= N/A                                                                                                       |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| PAM                        | pam_score         | Pam sumscore                                                                                                                       |                                                                                                                                                                             |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| PAID                       | paid1             | Feeling scared when you think about living with diabetes                                                                           | 0= Not a problem, 1= Minor problem, 2=Moderate problem, 3=Somewhat serious problem, 4= Serious problem                                                                      | That you feel frightened at the thought of living with diabetes?                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| PAID                       | paid2             | Feeling depressed when you think about living with diabetes                                                                        | 0= Not a problem, 1= Minor problem, 2=Moderate problem, 3=Somewhat serious problem, 4= Serious problem                                                                      | That you feel downhearted at the thought of living with diabetes?                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| PAID                       | paid3             | Worrying about the future and the possibility of serious complications                                                             | 0= Not a problem, 1= Minor problem, 2=Moderate problem, 3=Somewhat serious problem, 4= Serious problem                                                                      | That you are worried about the future and the risk of serious complications?                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| PAID                       | paid4             | Feeling that diabetes is taking up too much of your mental and physical energy every day                                           | 0= Not a problem, 1= Minor problem, 2=Moderate problem, 3=Somewhat serious problem, 4= Serious problem                                                                      | That your diabetes takes up too much of your mental and physical energy in everyday life?                                                                                                                                                                             |
| PAID                       | paid5             | Coping with complications of diabetes                                                                                              | 0= Not a problem, 1= Minor problem, 2=Moderate problem, 3=Somewhat serious problem, 4= Serious problem                                                                      | Being able to cope with complications of diabetes?                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| PAID                       | paid_score        | Paid sumscore                                                                                                                      |                                                                                                                                                                             |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| PAID                       | paid_problem      | Paid problem                                                                                                                       | 0=no paid problem, 1=paid problem (paid_sumscore>8)                                                                                                                         |                                                                                                                 

</details>|



<details class="custom-details">
<summary>2024 Codebook</summary>


| Questionnaire                   | Variable         | Response scales                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | Question                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| ------------------------------- | ---------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| Generic/Social                  | Height           | cm                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | How tall are you (without shoes)?<br><br>Write height in whole cm.<br><br>If you do not know your exact height, please provide your best estimate.                                                                             |
